summary: Phase 47 Tracking History Drawer - All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Tracking endpoint returns 5 seeded events newest-first with location/activity. Drawer UI shows vertical timeline with dot colors, Latest badge, AWB header, Shiprocket link, close via X/backdrop, body scroll lock, and empty state.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 5 seeded events for test order
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 47 Tracking History fully tested. Key features: (1) GET /api/customer/orders/{id}/tracking returns order tracking with events array sorted newest-first. (2) Each event includes raw_status, mapped_status, courier_name, location, activity, event_time, received_at. (3) Cross-customer scoping returns 404. (4) Webhook handlers extract location and activity fields from payloads. (5) Frontend TrackingHistoryDrawer shows vertical timeline with dot colors (green=delivered, blue=shipped, amber=processing, red=cancelled). (6) Drawer has Latest badge on first event, AWB header, View on Shiprocket link, close via X/backdrop, body scroll lock. (7) Empty state shows 'No tracking events yet' with truck icon. (8) Button visibility: shown when order.awb_code OR order.shiprocket_last_event OR status in [processing, shipped, delivered].

tests: GET /api/customer/orders/{id}/tracking returns 200 for owner
Response includes order_id, order_number, awb_code, courier_name, shipped_at, delivered_at, status, events[]
Each event has raw_status, mapped_status, courier_name, location, activity, event_time, received_at
Events sorted newest-first by event_time
5 seeded events with locations Gurugram → Mumbai → Bangalore → Bangalore (delivered)
Cross-customer access returns 404
No auth returns 401
Non-existent order returns 404
Tracking webhook extracts location and activity fields
Order-status webhook extracts location and activity fields
Graceful handling of payloads without location/activity (no crash)
Drawer opens when 'Tracking history' button clicked
Header shows 'AWB <code> · <courier>' when AWB exists
Header shows 'No AWB allocated yet' when no AWB
Vertical timeline of events with Latest badge on first (newest) event
Each event shows raw_status as title, activity as subtitle, location with MapPin icon, courier_name, formatted timestamp
Dot color: green for delivered, blue for shipped, amber for processing
View on Shiprocket link points to https://shiprocket.co/tracking/<awb>
Close via X button works
Close via backdrop click works
Body scroll locked while drawer open
Body scroll restored on close
Empty state shows 'No tracking events yet' with truck icon
Button visible for delivered order with AWB
Button NOT visible for payment_pending order with no AWB and no shiprocket_last_event
Button visible for processing order (even without AWB)
